program.name: Fee Calculator
intake.purpose: Calculate a deterministic subscription fee from plan, seats, and region facts.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"calculate_fee","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.plan","inputs.initial_user_text.seats","inputs.initial_user_text.region","runtime.now"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","plan":"string","seats":"number","region":"string","base_usd":"number","seat_rate_usd":"number","subtotal_usd":"number","region_multiplier":"number","total_usd":"number","currency":"USD","priced_at":"ISO timestamp string"},"items_json":["plan:<plan>","seats:<seats>","total_usd:<total_usd>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Use pricing table by plan: starter has base_usd 40 and seat_rate_usd 5; pro has base_usd 100 and seat_rate_usd 7; enterprise has base_usd 500 and seat_rate_usd 12.","Use region multiplier table: us = 1, eu = 1.2, apac = 1.1, any other region = 1.","subtotal_usd = base_usd + seats * seat_rate_usd.","total_usd = Math.round(subtotal_usd * region_multiplier).","currency is USD and priced_at is runtime.now()."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal calculate_fee.","plan, seats, and region must be echoed from the parsed request without defaulting when present.","items_json must be exactly [\"plan:<plan>\", \"seats:<seats>\", \"total_usd:<total_usd>\"] using computed values."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
